title: Fix BLE UART connection ref race
description: Trigger: ble_uart_send_slip() reads s_conn at lichen/apps/gateway/src/ble_uart.c:252, then on_disconnected() can run and bt_conn_unref()/NULL the global before line 257 calls bt_conn_ref(conn). Impact: TX during disconnect can take a reference on a freed Bluetooth connection object, causing a use-after-free or invalid refcount operation. Protect s_conn with a mutex/atomic lifetime protocol or otherwise acquire the reference in a disconnect-safe critical section.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
